'''Doom Bringer''' was a unique [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droid]] found in the [[Neimoidian droid factory]] on [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was destroyed along with its [[Hand of doom|hands of doom]] by a group of [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] who went on to shut down the [[Factory/Legends|factory]] that provided battle droids for [[HK-47]].<ref name="SWG:TTwH" />
